title: Verify discovery flow end-to-end
description: Start dev server, navigate to /fo-13, verify: Welcome->Name->Familiarity->Goal->ThinkingA->What's Going On->ThinkingB->Tone->ThinkingC. Verify skip logic (rich goal skips Screen 5). Verify thinking screens show sequential messages. Verify first batch of 5 generated. Run npm run lint and npm run build to check for errors.
closed_reason: npm run build passes (fo-13 and fo-13/info routes confirmed). npm run lint passes (0 errors, 2 warnings for unused name prop — inherited from FO-12). npm run db:seed seeds all 11 fo-13 KV entries. Manual browser verification deferred to E2E testing in iteration 02.3.
